rationale: Multi-level routing with timeout, escalation logic, and human-review gating needs moderate judgment; review_mode=always rules out haiku.
Audit digests + compliance reports require aggregation and structured prose; more than pure templating.
Fixed-format weekly HTML digest of reconciliation metrics — templated rollup with no synthesis judgment.
KB page composition + email + threshold-gated alerts spans multiple output types with editorial judgment.
Threat trends, resolved cases, and defensive recommendations require synthesis and editorial judgment beyond templating.
30-day gap analysis + writer workload balance requires moderate analytical judgment; review_mode=on_low_confidence confirms non-trivial output.
Fixed weekly expense summary with MTD tracking — straightforward aggregation into a known template.
Cash flow summary with AR aging and WoW deltas — mechanical aggregation of financial metrics into a fixed layout.
Composite scoring + memory calibration based on review feedback requires iterative judgment; review_mode=always raises stakes.

Trend analysis + anomaly detection on revenue data requires pattern recognition and interpretive judgment beyond simple templating.
Per-finding memory and longitudinal intelligence building requires synthesis and structured knowledge capture beyond basic reporting.
Pipeline snapshot with velocity + at-risk detection — aggregating CRM fields by threshold rules into a daily digest.

MRR waterfall + anomaly detection + multi-channel distribution requires pattern recognition and multi-output orchestration.
Structured report composition from survey insights + baseline update involves synthesis and editorial judgment.
Daily ops rollup of command totals, service health, deploys — mechanical aggregation posted to channels.
MTTR rankings + improvement recommendations require analytical synthesis; dual digest+weekly format adds orchestration complexity.
Email parsing, dedup, audit record creation, and high-privilege classification — structured extraction with rule-based routing.
Finance platform ↔ bank-feed matching and discrepancy logging — deterministic record reconciliation with no synthesis.
AI receipt extraction from unstructured email content requires parsing ambiguous formats; review_mode=on_low_confidence confirms non-trivial extraction.
Finance platform → Sheets sync with anomaly detection — deterministic data sync with threshold-based flagging.
Per-client invoice generation with human review gating and memory-learned overrides requires moderate judgment; review_mode=always rules out haiku.

Escalation enforcement across every open incident with status processing; review_mode=always signals consequential output.

Natural language command parsing with authorization checks requires NL understanding and security-aware judgment.
Two-step confirmation gate for destructive ops; review_mode=always + safety-critical context rules out haiku.

30/14/7 day deadline reminders — calendar-driven notifications with no judgment beyond date arithmetic.

Tiered unsigned-contract reminders with capped sends — rule-based cadence with deterministic escalation logic.

Threshold-triggered anomaly alerts with dedupe against history log — deterministic rule-based alerting.
